summary: Comprehensive testing of Visor Finance Tax Module Phase 0 + Phase 1 features. 28/28 backend tests passing (100%). All 4 new UI components rendering correctly. 1 display bug found and code-fixed in Section80CTracker.tsx (division by 100 instead of 1000 for K-formatting of remaining amount). FinancialHealthV2Card 'frequency is not defined' bug confirmed FIXED. Visor AI context injection working with salary/income profile data.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - no DELETE endpoint for income-profile. Cannot test fresh-user state easily. POST resets to empty if needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Display bug: '₹854K remaining' instead of '₹85.4K remaining' (line 93: remaining_80c / 100 should be / 1000). FIXED IN CODE but external proxy/CDN is caching old bundle.
Display bug: '₹500K extra deduction beyond 80C limit' instead of '₹50K' (line 136: nps_remaining / 100 should be / 1000). FIXED IN CODE but proxy cache serving old bundle.

issues: The 'Instrument Breakdown' expand section is working well. Color-coded dots for ELSS (orange), EPF (green), Life Insurance (blue) - looks clean.
HRA limiting condition highlighted in orange/amber with arrow '→' prefix - excellent visual clarity.

action_items: REQUIRED: Restart expo to force fresh bundle delivery: `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` — This will bust the Kubernetes ingress cache and serve the updated bundle with fixed K-formatting in Section80CTracker (₹85.4K remaining instead of ₹854K; ₹50K NPS deduction instead of ₹500K). Source fix already applied at lines 93,136 of Section80CTracker.tsx.
OPTIONAL: Add DELETE /api/tax/income-profile endpoint for resetting user's income profile (currently only GET/POST available)
OPTIONAL: Verify demo salary profile employer name - current value is 'TCS', review_request stated 'Tata Consultancy'. Restore fixture may need the correct original employer.
critical_code_review_comments: Section80CTracker.tsx line 93: `remaining_80c / 100` → BUG: shows '₹854K remaining' for ₹85,400. FIXED to / 1000 (now shows ₹85.4K). Verify with proxy cache clear.
Section80CTracker.tsx line 136: `nps_remaining / 100` → BUG: shows '₹500K extra deduction' for ₹50,000. FIXED to / 1000 (now shows ₹50K). Verify with proxy cache clear.
FinancialHealthV2Card.tsx: `frequency` prop now has default='Month' on line 85 - the 'frequency is not defined' bug IS CONFIRMED FIXED - no JS errors in dashboard.
visor_engine.py lines 135-165: salary_profile + income_profile context injection working correctly - AI correctly calculates ₹2,64,000 HRA for Mumbai metro based on injected salary data.
tax_enhanced.py: All 6 new endpoints return correct data. HRA 3-condition formula verified mathematically: c1=384000, c2=480000, c3=264000, exemption=264000 (Condition 3 limiting).

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all components render + interact correctly; 2 display bugs code-fixed, pending proxy cache clear)

test_credentials.note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md file not found - credentials sourced from review_request

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created/modified salary profiles during testing (TEST_Infosys, TEST_Wipro, TEST_TCS, etc.) and restore fixture set employer='Tata Consultancy'. Current demo user salary profile: employer=TCS, Mumbai, basic=80000, hra=32000, rent=30000 (functional, just employer name differs from initial).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for Phase 0+1 pass (100%). Frontend UI confirmed working via screenshots: disclaimer collapsible, 80C tracker with instrument breakdown expanded, HRA 3-condition expandable with limiting condition highlighted, salary wizard 3-step modal opens. Code fix applied for display bug in Section80CTracker.tsx (/ 100 → / 1000 for both remaining_80c and nps_remaining). Proxy CDN is caching old JS bundle - external URL shows '854K remaining' but localhost:3000 bundle confirmed shows '85K remaining'. Main agent must clear proxy/CDN cache or restart expo with --clear. IncomeProfileSetup card correctly hidden when profile exists. Visor AI working with correct context injection.

bug_1.root_cause: Developer used `/ 100` (paise conversion?) instead of `/ 1000` (to convert rupees to K) for the K-formatted remaining display. So ₹85,400 / 100 = 854 → '₹854K' instead of ₹85,400 / 1000 = 85.4 → '₹85.4K'
bug_1.fix: Changed both occurrences to / 1000. Source file confirmed fixed. Code deployed to dev server.
bug_1.mitigation: Clear Kubernetes ingress/CDN cache or restart expo with --clear flag.

proxy_cache_issue.root_cause: Kubernetes ingress proxy is caching the JS bundle. localhost:3000 serves updated bundle with fix, but external URL https://morning-brief-learn.preview.emergentagent.com serves cached old bundle.
proxy_cache_issue.verification: curl http://localhost:3000/bundle | grep 'remaining_80c' → shows '/ 1000' and '85K' confirming fix is in local bundle.

key_verifications.salary_profile_api: GET/POST /api/tax/salary-profile - 200 OK, saves with city_type auto-detect ✓
key_verifications.disclaimer_banner_ui: Visible, collapsible, shows full text on expand ✓
key_verifications.salary_wizard_ui: Trigger card visible, opens modal, Next/Back navigation Step 1→2 works ✓
key_verifications.section_80c_ui: Progress bar with colored segments, expand shows ELSS/EPF/LIC, NPS section ✓
key_verifications.hra_card_ui: Shows ₹2,64,000/year, expand shows 3 conditions, Condition 3 limiting (highlighted) ✓
key_verifications.financial_health_v2_no_crash: Dashboard shows '50 pts this month' - NO frequency JS error ✓
key_verifications.visor_ai_context_injection: POST /api/visor-ai/chat returns correct ₹2,64,000 HRA based on salary profile ✓
